auth.label: API Key
auth.description: EmailOctopus API key used by the official v1 API. Create or manage it from the API key screen in your EmailOctopus account: https://help.emailoctopus.com/article/165-how-to-create-and-delete-api-keys

actions.name: create_list_contact
actions.description: Create a contact in an EmailOctopus mailing list.

email_address.description: Contact email address accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

fields.description: Custom contact fields object accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

items.description: Tag name accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

tags.description: Tag names accepted by the official create-contact API.

status.description: Contact status value accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for creating a contact in an EmailOctopus list.

contact.description: Contact object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Single EmailOctopus contact response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: delete_list_contact
actions.description: Delete a contact from an EmailOctopus mailing list.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching or deleting a single EmailOctopus contact.

outputSchema.description: Success marker returned after an EmailOctopus no-content response.

actions.name: get_campaign
actions.description: Fetch a single EmailOctopus campaign by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a single EmailOctopus campaign.

campaign.description: Campaign object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Single EmailOctopus campaign response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Fetch a single EmailOctopus mailing list by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a single EmailOctopus list.

list.description: List object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Single EmailOctopus list response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: get_list_contact
actions.description: Fetch a single contact from an EmailOctopus mailing list.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching or deleting a single EmailOctopus contact.

contact.description: Contact object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Single EmailOctopus contact response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: list_campaigns
actions.description: List EmailOctopus campaigns available to the current API key.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, up to 100.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing EmailOctopus campaigns.

items.description: Campaign object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

campaigns.description: Campaigns returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

limit.description: Page size returned by the official API.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by the official API.

total_pages.description: Total number of pages returned by the official API.

anyOf.description: URL of the next page, if available.
URL of the previous page, if available.

paging.description: Pagination object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Paginated EmailOctopus campaign collection response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: list_list_contacts
actions.description: List contacts in a specific EmailOctopus mailing list.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, up to 100.

inputSchema.description: Path and query parameters for listing contacts in an EmailOctopus list.

items.description: Contact object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

contacts.description: Contacts returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

limit.description: Page size returned by the official API.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by the official API.

total_pages.description: Total number of pages returned by the official API.

anyOf.description: URL of the next page, if available.
URL of the previous page, if available.

paging.description: Pagination object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Paginated EmailOctopus contact collection response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: list_lists
actions.description: List EmailOctopus mailing lists available to the current API key.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return, up to 100.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing EmailOctopus lists.

items.description: List object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

lists.description: Lists returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

limit.description: Page size returned by the official API.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by the official API.

total_pages.description: Total number of pages returned by the official API.

anyOf.description: URL of the next page, if available.
URL of the previous page, if available.

paging.description: Pagination object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Paginated EmailOctopus list collection response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: update_list_contact
actions.description: Update a contact in an EmailOctopus mailing list.

email_address.description: Contact email address accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

fields.description: Custom contact fields object accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

additionalProperties.description: Whether the tag should be added or removed.

tags.description: Tag update map accepted by the official update-contact API.

status.description: Contact status value accepted by the official EmailOctopus API.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for updating a contact in an EmailOctopus list.

contact.description: Contact object returned by the official EmailOctopus API.

outputSchema.description: Single EmailOctopus contact response normalized by the connector.
